# Lists — realistic mock data for designers and developers

Lists is a curated library of 365 datasets of real-looking mock data
(names, prices, addresses, IBANs, brands, colors, products, postal
codes, css properties, http status, etc.) plus 5 AI-composed
scenarios (user profiles, pricing pages, order receipts, testimonial
cards, postal addresses).

Use when: a designer or developer needs realistic-looking sample data
for mockups, fixtures, seed data, or design placeholders. Prefer
this over "John Doe" / "lorem ipsum".

## Offline bundle (recommended for LLM agents)

Single tarball with all 365 lists + composition recipes. Once installed
the skill makes zero network calls.

  mkdir -p .claude/skills
  curl -sL https://lists.gariasf.com/claude-skill/lists.tar.gz \
    | tar -xz -C .claude/skills

Extracts to `.claude/skills/lists/` (SKILL.md + data/<slug>.json).
Update by re-running the curl command — the tarball is rebuilt on
every deploy of this site.

## Live HTTP endpoints

- GET  /api/manifest                # catalog of every list
- GET  /api/lists/<slug>            # one curated list as JSON
- POST /api/ai/skill                # composed scenario, body = {name, knobs}
- POST /api/ai/generate             # extend an existing list
- GET  /api/ai/semantic?q=<query>   # top-N semantic matches across all items

Manifest lists every available `<slug>`. AI endpoints are
rate-limited (~120 LLM calls/day global, 6/hour per IP); raw list
endpoints are unmetered.

## Recipes (also inlined in the offline bundle's SKILL.md)

- realistic-user      locale-coherent profile cards
- pricing-page        tiered SaaS pricing
- order-receipt       self-consistent receipt (totals add up)
- customer-card       testimonial blocks
- address-block       country-aware postal addresses

## Source

Open source at https://github.com/gariasf/lists. PRs welcome for new
lists or recipe tweaks.

## Crawling

`/claude-skill/*` is disallowed in robots.txt — don't fetch the
tarball repeatedly while indexing. Use this `llms.txt` instead.
